introSection: Vertigorama is a Racing Steel roller coaster located at Parque de la Ciudad in Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Built by Intamin AG and their former subcontractor Giovanola, this coaster was planned to open for the 1983 season, roughly a year after the park opened. However, the coaster has never opened.

fullText:
Vertigorama is a Racing Steel roller coaster located at Parque de la Ciudad in Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Built by Intamin AG and their former subcontractor Giovanola, this coaster was planned to open for the 1983 season, roughly a year after the park opened. However, the coaster has never opened.
